game.title: Puckit!
game.short_text: infinite air hockey game

details.title: Puckit!
details.description:
Puckit!
The game works  best on mobile
A game made in 2 weeks for the annual Gamedev.js gamejam 2024. The theme is, Power, and in this game, you power up your power puck to plunge the puny pawns into the pits. I call it Puckit!
Everything is made by me, including code, graphics, animations, and sound effects. The background music is not made entirely by me. I took an existing track and made a remix of it.
How to play


Drag finger or mouse to send your puck towards the enemy puck
Score points and charge your battery by putting enemies in the holesUnleash a devastating power blow by tapping the charged battery, destroying all enemies within proximity
Score as many points as you can before you spend all your shots or fall in a hole yourself
License


All rights reserved

details.title: (Jam) Dashido Adventure
details.description:
Controls:

Hold Left Mouse button - Ready dash strike

Release Left Mouse button - Perform dash strike / Throw NPC

WASD - movement (inside building)
Refresh page to restart game


The Dashido Adventure mode is the main game mode, arcade and ironman are bonus.
An entry for GameDev js Jam by Eero Höök ( Roikku / LakeDead )

ISSUE: For some reason there's slowdown on overworld map
For this reason the objective was left easy to reach.
Demo intentionally left short for players to see the entire gameplay loop.

Theme: Power. The player diminishes enemy Clan Power (influence)
Challenge: NPC. You can use enemy npcs as projectiles.


Due to popular request I re-enabled arcade and ironman modes.

The game's super easy due to the ability to throw enemies,
so Ironman with permadeath is the most challenging way to go! 
However, the ADVENTURE mode is supposed to be the main game mode. 

Made in Game Maker BETA as a solo project

Support the Dev:

paypal.me/roikkudev

game.title: PowerLess Hotel
game.short_text: Blackout! Can you restore power to the hotel, or will you be defeated by phantoms...?

details.title: PowerLess Hotel
details.description:
Blackout! Can you restore power to the hotel, or will you be defeated by phantoms...?
Available for both Web and Download!

Version 1.0.1
To view the original version of the game that was released for the "Gamedev.js 2024" game jam, go to: https://imaad-phoplunker.itch.io/powerlesshotel-gamedev-js-jam-version?password=gamedevjs


Controls
WASD/Arrow Keys - Move

Move Mouse - Aim
Left Mouse Button - Use Torch
Right Mouse Button - Summon Room Service
Space - Tip Room Service
OP - Adjust BrightnessShift+M - Mute/Unmute

Also, In case you find this game too difficult or run into any unexpected bugs, I have also provided some cheat codes that should help!


Spoiler: Cheat Codes
Hold both "," and "shift", then press "3" - Gain Health
Press "1", "0", "z" and "m" - Force Open All Doors

 


Gamedev.js Jam
The original version of game was made in 13 days for Gamedev.js Jam 2024

https://itch.io/jam/gamedevjs-2024

This game was also made with two of the optional challenges from the jam in mind. These challenges are:
Open Source by GitHub 
&
NPC by OP Games
For information on how this game meets the challenge criteria, view the spoiler below, but be warned, this does contain some spoilers for the game!


Spoiler: Jam Challenges
As part of the "Open Source by GitHub" challenge, the source code for this game can be found at: https://github.com/iplnkr/PowerGame
As part of the "NPC by OP Games" challenge, this game features an NPC known as "Room Service" that gives the player the initial mission and can be summoned to help in combat. This NPC also has a twist however, as if the player does not tip the room service enough (enough being 2 coins for each time he is summoned), by the end of the game, the NPC changes allegiances and assists the enemies instead during the final boss fight.



Credits
All code, art, animation, sound effects, and music were made by me during the 13 days of the jam.
The font used for most of the text in the game was also made by me, but was made before the jam. It was not made solely for the purpose of being used for this game jam.
This game was made using Unity. The art was made using Inkscape. The sound effects and music were made using Cakewalk by BandLab.

game.title: Mech Motion
game.short_text: Plan a sequence of moves and assist your robot helper to restore power

details.title: Mech Motion
details.description:
Mech Motion
Guide your robotic helper through mazes using a sequence of movement cards. Collect all the charges before the power runs out! Tests your problem-solving skills in electrifying fashion.
Mech Motion was made during Gamedev.js Jam 2024.

How to play
Drag and drop the movement cards to reorganize themPress "Go!" to execute the sequence of movesMove into charges to collect them
About
Made by GolenMade using Phaser
Full song: ultraaboxOriginal song: Off But Still On by Shady MonkSource code: https://github.com/Chocobois/Power/Mac


The app is unsigned when built, so you need to follow these steps when distributing:
First you need to extract the .app from the .dmg before attempting to run the game.Second, try running the game, a popup will say the app is unverified.Right click/Open the context menu on the .app, hold option, click open.Click open in the popup.
The game will start normally from now on.
Linux
You may have to mark the games as executable before it will let you run them.
There have been reports of the game freezing, so the web version might be preferred in that case.

game.title: Storm UltraVolt
game.short_text: a blend of bullet heaven and boss fighting action in which you play as a sexy goblin

details.title: Storm UltraVolt
details.description:
--------------------------------------------------------------
A little jam game featuring a boss fight with bullet heaven inspirations that was made in around 10 days for: 
Gamedev.js Jam 2024
Theme: Power
In this short action-packed game, you'll play as the lean, sexy powerhouse known as Storm. She has made it her mission to destroy the foreign machines who have come to strip her homelands of its resources in order to power their machines. To do this she's going to hit them where it hurts, the power plant. Dismantling this behemoth will prove to be difficult, given that the power plant is a sentient machine itself who commands a legion of robotic underlings. But Storm is up to the task because she's not any ordinary goblin. She has fierce lightning powers gifted to her by the gods.
Controls:
Hover over Icons with the mouse in the level up screen and left click to select
W, A, S D  or Arrow Keys if you want to cramp your handsMovementMouse and Left Mouse ClickAim and Shoot BoltsHold Right ClickUltraBolt Aiming modeSpace or QDodge Hold ShiftSprintPress PPause
-Dodging moves Storm toward the cursor.
-While in UltraBolt aiming mode make sure the reticle is in range of Storm, otherwise you can not cast the bolt. Press Left mouse when you want to fire.
Leveling UP:
If you've socked enough metal heads, you'll level up. Your progress is tracked in a bar at the bottom of the screen. Each time you level, it'll require more XP to level up again.
When you level up you have the option of choosing either a Power upgrade or a Resilience upgrade. Power upgrades will mainly involve dealing damage, while Resilience upgrades have more to do with fortitude and protection. Some upgrades are just plain stat changes and others may alter gameplay. Either way, they become more powerful with stacks.

. . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . . 
My Commentary:
Development was kind of a mess because I couldn't decide what I wanted to make. I knew from the start I wanted a goblin destroying generators that use resources from her homeland as fuel. But it took me a while to arrive at a game that works off that concept. Eventually, I thought up this bullet heaven concept, which are games inspired by Vampire Survivors. They're rooted in power fantasy, so I figured that'd do.
Due to time constraints, it lacks polish in some areas and severely lacks testing and balancing. It be that way in a jam sometimes ≡(▔﹏▔)≡ But I got to draw a sexy goblin girl and that makes it all okay. I wish I had time to give some story to this game though to expand on her character. And time to think of something other than "Storm Ultravolt". It's like I was trying to sound cool, but in a lame way.

Credits:
The sweet tunes are by nene: https://opengameart.org/users/nene
A few sounds sourced from Zapsplat: https://www.zapsplat.com/ 
, other SFX made with chiptone: https://sfbgames.itch.io/chiptone

Post Jam Edits:
-added fire rate upgrade
-added pause
-added volume widgets
-Improved Dodge mechanic a bit
-light polishing here and there
-slight balance changes
Unless somebody finds a game breaking bug, that's all I'm doing

game.title: ElectriCity
game.short_text: It's time for Stan to step up and fix the City’s power grid before the dusk.

details.title: ElectriCity
details.description:
This is our contribution to the GameDev.JS Game Jam 2024 where we came in 5th place among 238 games.Move - WASD/ Arrow keysStart/Stop working - SpaceTurn node - LMB/RMBGo to Main Menu - EnterIf the game feels laggy, reduce light and LOD levels for better results.StoryIn the heart of the bustling City, where it's pulse beats strongest, stood Stan, the seasoned city electrician.There has been a sudden power surge in the power grid that broke almost all of the lighting in the City.
For Stan, this was more than just a job. It was a testament to his unwavering dedication to the city he called home. Each flickering streetlamp and darkened storefront, served as a reminder of the task at hand.
It's time for Stan to step up and fix the City’s power grid before the dusk, so that the City might be lit in the dark again.
Tulenväki Productions © 2024

game.title: Power Saver
game.short_text: Keep all the devices under control in this fast-paced power management game.

details.title: Power Saver
details.description:
Note: This game is in development. It was created for the Gamedev.js Jam 2024. 


Gameplay
You play as the power-saver fairy, you can turn stuff on and off, and plug and unplug stuff. You can click on devices to see if they are being used or are wasting power. You can also drag cable endpoints to devices and power sockets to connect them.
Scoring
Your goal is to keep your friend Luzy happy.
The game is deterministic. Pay attention to the following rules to maximize your score:
When Luzy is in the room, she wants the lights on.When Luzy is not in the room, she wants the lights off.When she is using a device, you should keep it on.When she is not using a device, you should turn it off.A device that uses battery power, will only work if the battery is not empty.A device that has a battery, will charge the battery when connected to a power socket
The rules are checked at an interval and you score points for every rule that you are successfully satisfying. The first 10 levels are deterministic and a snapshot of your score will be displayed for bragging rights. How did you do?
Credits

Music and SFX by checkpoint: https://ch3ckpo1nt.com/(also contributed game ideas and playtesting)Animated girl sprite by GameArt2D: https://www.gameart2d.com/cute-girl-free-sprites.htmlJelly sprite by GameArt2D: https://www.gameart2d.com/jelly-squash-free-sprites.htmlAll the object images on the table are from Kenney's Generic Items Pack: https://kenney.nl/assets/generic-itemsI make liberal use of the Antialiased Line2D add-on for Godot 3.x add-on: https://github.com/godot-extended-libraries/godot-antialiased-line2dGame Jam idea: https://itch.io/jam/gamedevjs-2024

Sources: https://github.com/josepvalls/godot-power-saver

game.short_text: Do maths, but only with two (GamedevJS 2024 entry)
game.title: The Power Of Two

details.title: The Power Of Two
details.description:
[Click on the top right corner icon to enable music]


A math game by xem for GamedevJS 2024

About the theme:
The theme was POWER. It made me think about "powers of two", often used in computer science. Then I decided to do a Math game where two is the only number available. And after some levels, the calculator even gets a real "power" button!

Levels:
No less than 1017 levels to complete!
A high score system allows you to share how far you got on X / Twitter.

Challenges:
- Github: https://github.com/xem/gamedevjs2024/
- NPC: a special someone will play with you after level 15
- JS13kGames: zipped game is less than 5kb unminified (+ 5.3kb for the title font)
Cross-reference:
Shout out to "Powered by HI" by Korhosik: https://adrien-gueret.itch.io/powered-by-hi

game.title: Flyer Power
game.short_text: Create flyers to engage the public

details.title: Flyer Power
details.description:
Flyer Power! Influence the public with the power of flyers. Design flyers for the community based on the area the flyer will be in, and deploy them for maximum success!
There is help available in game through the ? in the corner of most screens. To get started, wait for the phone to ring, then click to pick it up. Click on the text that pops up to save it to a draft flyer, then click the empty flyer on the desk to edit it.
On the edit screen you can drag notes from the flyer request as well as a variety of stickers onto the flyer. The arrangement of the layout is up to you, though paying attention to the region name will give a small hint as to the best layout. Experimentation is the key, as the attributes of the four regions remain consistent between plays.
Once your flyer is ready to go, click on the right facing arrow to deploy it to the streets!If you want to save it and go back to the office for some reason, you can hit the save icon (the floppy disk). You can also use the bomb to completely clear the flyer.On the street view screen you will deploy your flyer. Move the flyer up and down the pole do determine the best placement, depending on the region. Click the back button to go back to the design screen.Once you have it in the right place, click the check mark to have people start walking past and engaging with it. If your engagement gauge fills all the way, then your flyer was successful!All art, sound, and music created by me.

game.title: Power-Up Adventure
game.short_text: A jump 'n' run game where you need to provide power-ups to the player to help them through the level.

details.title: Power-Up Adventure
details.description:
In this jump 'n' run game you play the crucial role of POWER-UP provider rather than the player. Your mission is straightforward yet electrifying: Supply the player with essential power-ups like the ROCKET and SPEED to aid their progression through each level. Timing is key in this game!
Can you play the perfect game? (0 Deaths)
My submission to Gamedev.js Jam 2024!Challenges I participated for this jam:
Open Source Challenge by GitHub: Code is available on GitHub.Build it with Phaser Challenge by Phaser Studio: Phaser framework was used to create this game.
Controls
MouseTouchKeyboard:
W / Up Arrow: Spawn rocket power-upS / Down Arrow: Spawn speed power-upEnter / Space: StartUse the same keys to navigate in the title screen
How to Play
The player runs blindly through the levels full of dangers. You fly in front of them and need to supply power-ups at the perfect time to get the player save through all the 10 levels. The number of power-ups are limited per level. Use them wisely!
Spawn power-ups using the buttons on the left or W / Up Arrow (Rocket) and S / Down Arrow (Speed) key. 
Challenge


Can you play the perfect game? (0 Deaths)
Credits and Tools
Special thanks to my support and inspiration at home!Thanks to my play testers.GitHub PageFramework: Phaser 3
Code: Home made typescript spaghetti code using WebStormBundler: vite.js
Graphics: 1-Bit Platformer Pack (with some edits from me using Aseprite) from Kenneys Game Assets All-in-1 bundle
Music: All by myself using Reaper, Focusrite Scarlett 2i2 interface, AmpliTube 5 plugin, a Gibson SG Special, a ALESIS Q49 midi keyboard, Decent Sampler plugin, mRhodes samples, Pocket Operators PO-32 tonic and PO-14 sub.Sound effects: My vacuum cleaner (rocket sound) and various sounds from Kenneys Game Assets All-in-1 bundle
Font: Minogram 6x10 from frostyfreeze

game.title: Realm Escape
game.short_text: Realm Escape is a captivating puzzle game created using the Gdevelop engine

details.title: Realm Escape
details.description:
Realm Escape is a captivating puzzle game created using the Gdevelop engine for the Gamedvjs 2024 Jam. Traverse through dream realms, solving puzzles and outsmarting challenges to find your way out. Choose your moves wisely and explore diverse solutions to escape each realm's grasp.

In the Realm Escape, you wield powers through unique cards, each with its own distinct ability. These cards are limited in use, adding a strategic dimension to your journey.

Within the game, cards manifest in three distinct forms: the Move Card, the Sword Card, and the Teleport Card. Each card type boasts its own range and specific application, offering diverse strategic possibilities.

Move Card
The Move card grants you a range of three steps, enabling you to navigate through the stage with agility and precision.

Sword Card
The Sword card also provides a range of three steps, empowering you to vanquish the stage's menacing monsters, known as 'Dream Wisps'.

Teleport Card
The Teleport card boasts an impressive radius of six steps, granting you the ability to transcend impassable terrain and effortlessly bypass formidable foes, such as the 'Dream Wisps'.


There are two unique cards: Swap, which is the upgraded version of the Teleport card, and Teleportblade, which is the upgraded version of the Sword card.


Many thanks to Bug/Wilbur for crafting such delightful and captivating artwork for Realm Escape! Keep an eye out, as some of these charming NPCs will be making their debut in the upcoming stages. and to Withering-systems for the amazing asset


You can support me by following my social media, checking out the game on the Play Store, and providing any form of feedback. I hope you enjoy the game!

X: https://twitter.com/NasrollahAbid 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nasrollahabid/

details.title: Vortex
details.description:
Welcome to Vortex, a thrilling rogue-like space adventure where strategy and quick reflexes are your keys to survival. Developed for the Gamedev.js Jam 2024, Vortex plunges you into a chaotic cosmos and invites you to master the art of survival using portals and carefully selected power-ups to enhance your ship's abilities.
How to Play
Controls:

Left Click: Place the blue portal.
Right Click: Place the red portal.
Hold Click: Adjust the direction of the portal's exit.
Right & Left Click: Combine portals.A,W,D: Movement.

Credits:
Chantz Doan - Programmer & Game Design
Justus Heath - ART & Game Design
Ryan Heath - ART & Game Design

moreInfo.Author: CtrlAltDefeat Studio
moreInfo.Tags: Bullet Hell, Pixel Art, Retro, Roguelike

game.title: Core
game.short_text: Travel deep into the heart of a churning machine. A Short platformer and 2D pixelised game. Made in Godot.

details.title: Core
details.description:
Core is a short Platformer-style  game made for the Gamedev.js Jam 2024!
The Core contains vessels to contain its power. A machine that churns unending, un-knowing of the world that abandoned it. 
The Vessels of metal who lay deep within its centre hold the key.

[Made in Godot 4.2]
Let me know any feedback in the comments!
Controls:
WASD - To move
SPACE - To jump
E - To interact
R - To reset-UPDATE-Fixed buggy collisions in Sector 2Added a better respawn system that allows you choose where to respawn, whether it's the Centre, your current Sector, etc.

moreInfo.Author: Mr Blumbo
moreInfo.Tags: 2D, Global Game Jam, Godot, Mechs, Pixel Art, Robots

game.title: Power Crisis
game.short_text: Play cards, balance scales, defeat chaos.

details.title: Power Crisis
details.description:
Power Crisis
An entry for Gamedev.js 2024!!
Experience Power Crisis, blending Monopoly and deck-building for a strategic challenge. Manage power, resources, and pollution to keep the city alive. Can you navigate the crisis and lead the city to survival?
How to Play


Goal: 
Your goal is to sustain the city through each round. When you pass the start tile, it will check if current power meet the goal.
Tiles:
Resource Tile: You can collect resources from the tile if your storage is not depleted and also there are still resources on the tile.Power Plant Tile: There are three power plant tiles on which you can build one power plant each. Beside, no matter what number you roll, you must stop at the power plant tile to perform actions.
Power plant cards: 
Card Acquisition: You can discard and acquire new power plant cards at the beginning of each round. New cards become stronger as the round increases.Build Cost : Most of power plants need cost POWER for construction. (display on the bottom left corner of a card)Power Generation Cost: Some power plants require resources for electricity generation. (display on the top left corner of a card)Extra Effects: The central part of the card displays extra effects. After constructing the power plant, these effects will activate when the conditions are met.
Pollution: 
Generation: When generating power with coal, oil and natural gas, carbon emissions will increase. In the case of uranium, nuclear waste will be generatedPollution check: When pollution is generated, dices roll check is required. If the check fails, some tiles will be locked, preventing resource collection. (You could build biomass power plant for purifying)
Credit
BGM: Slim Shady, moodmode-studio from Pixabay

game.title: The Weak
game.short_text: Spread the terror in this narrative RPG inspired by 1980s slasher movies.

details.title: The Weak
details.description:
a game by low res duo
developed with Godot for Gamedev.js Jam 2024

Spread the terror in this narrative RPG inspired by 1980s slasher movies.

The year is 1986. Movies are filled with gory killers who, thanks to their incredible powers, chase their prey without hesitation. In this context, you play the role of The Weak, a killer unlike any other.

On a starless night, you approach Orchard Lane - the street where you spent your tormented childhood - with terrible intentions. What lies ahead for you?
Controls:

Move with WASD or arrow keys
Interact with Enter
Attack with Space

moreInfo.Author: Narrativi Digitali
moreInfo.Tags: Atmospheric, Comedy, Dark, Horror, Indie, Narrative, Pixel Art, Retro, Story Rich

game.title: PUCK IT UP
game.short_text: Shuffleboard with power pucks

details.title: PUCK IT UP
details.description:
Puck It UP is a shuffleboard game that features power pucks. Made for the GameDev.JS 2024 jam in Unity 6 WebGL. 
Controls:
 
Position the puck: Use 'WASD'
Aim: Use your mouse
Charge and fire the puck: Left click
Switch between pucks: Use the scroll wheel
Change Camera View: Press 'C'
Access settings: Press 'Esc'

I plan to add multiplayer support in the future but currently the game is local co-op or singleplayer
Assets used:Business Office - AK STUDIO ART (unity asset store)Modern Guns: Handgun - Nokobot (unity asset store)Modern UI Pack - Michsky (unity asset store)Particle pack - Unity (unity asset store)Happy Moment song - Lesfm (Pixabay)SFX - varius artists (Pixabay)

game.title: Pizza Boi

Horse Power, "Pizza Power" and the "power of music"
Skull boy had to get a job delivering pizza's. Might as well listen to some sick tunes while he's at it.
Playing in Firefox browser not recommended due to audio bugs
Made in only 2 days for the Gamedev.js Jam

arrow keys to steer and accelerate.

details.title: IONCLAD

Plasma cannons in space! How long can you survive?

Use arrow keys to move cannon
Hold Space to fire
Destroy enemy ships before they reach your shield
Collect friendly ships with your cannon to restore shield

game.title: Gleep Gym
game.short_text: Reach for the stars in this 2000s flash inspired warioware-like!

details.title: Gleep Gym
details.description:
Hi, human! Welcome to the Gleep Gym! Meet the other members and try to succeed in their challenges! Will your power level be enough to beat them??
Reach for the stars in this 00s flash inspired warioware-like ! This game was created as part of the GameDev.JS 2024 jam in 13 days with the theme 'POWER'. Thank you for playing Gleep Gym!
A sequence in the game contains visual effects that may trigger epileptic seizures in some individuals, so please play with caution and consult a healthcare professional if you experience any symptoms.

game.title: Charge Guardian
game.short_text: Defend your ship while it recharges power!

details.title: Charge Guardian
details.description:
Charge your ship! Save yourself! This wave-based combat survival is sure to show you the meaning of true power! 
Your robo-crew's ship has run out of juice and has been forced to land on a hostile planet! Can you overcome the league of enemies that march your way?  Survive until the battery charges and GTFO!
Built with Phaser and bitecs, not to mention a whole lot of love!
... and tears

game.title: Pawer Nap
game.short_text: Reach to the bed to take a paw-er nap.

details.title: Pawer Nap
details.description: After a long day at the office, it's your goal to guide this drowsy, wobbly friend safely to the bed for a much-needed PAW-er (power) nap! Avoid clumsily bumping into furniture, and grab PAW-er ade to replenish your energy along the way - Can you make it before succumbing to sleepiness?! InstructionsWSAD on PC or TOUCH STICK on mobile to balance the cat. Keep an eye on the energy bar.Made for Gamedev.js Jam 2024 !
